query:
UPDATE tags
        SET tag_path = (replace(tags.tag_path::text, $2, $3))::ltree
        FROM pictures p
        WHERE tags.picture_id = p.id
          AND p.local_user_id  = $1
          AND (
              tags.tag_path::text = $2
              OR starts_with(tags.tag_path::text, $2 || '.')
          )
